steps.title: Identify the slope of line k
steps.content: From the equation $y = 3x + 15$, the slope of line $k$ is the coefficient of $x$, which is 3.

steps.title: Apply the perpendicular slopes rule
steps.content: For perpendicular lines, their slopes are negative reciprocals. The negative reciprocal of 3 is $-\frac{1}{3}$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
